name: @phoenix/ota
description: OTA update server — reimplements the Jibo cloud 'Update' service (update-2016-03-01) so a robot can pull signed firmware subsystems (os/services/be/…) in place, preserving /var calibration. NOT part of the Pegasus conversational contract; a Phoenix extension for robot revival. Reference: confluence OTA Updater + jibo-ota-updater + jibo-server-client apis/update-2016-03-01.normal.json.
